meta.title: Chuck Blahous on the Cost of Living Adjustment for Seniors
meta.description: Senior Fellow Chuck Blahous discusses the Cost of Living Adjustment (COLA) for seniors. Is the $250 payment to seniors, proposed by the Obama administration, the right move?
